primary_message: Market conviction becomes credible when evidence is filtered, challenged, approved and recorded transparently.

proof_points.description: TraderFrame transforms fragmented market data into structured, verifiable evidence, ensuring only relevant and reliable inputs shape decisions.
Every decision is backed by a clear, auditable trail of evidence, enabling users to understand and challenge the logic behind each trade.
Traders and portfolio managers retain full control over their evidence, decisions, and risk parameters, ensuring autonomy in the decision-making process.
TraderFrame integrates real-time risk assessment and scenario modeling, helping users make informed, calibrated decisions with full visibility into potential outcomes.

call_to_action: Experience TraderFrame — where evidence shapes conviction, and conviction drives results.
